Other locations the gear can be found
Cornucopia Alliance Challenge
Ku's Envoy Totem

When attacking, the totem owner has a 50% chance to throw a magic orb at a random enemy unit. The orb bounces up to 2 times. The orb deals physical damage equal to 25% of their max health and magic damage equal to 25% of their missing health. If the target has less than 50% health left afterwards, they will be stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 90
